SELECT value, reinterpretAsInt16(value) AS res FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE nested_table (id UInt8, num Float64);
SELECT id, reinterpretAsInt16(num) AS res FROM nested_table;
CREATE TABLE join_table_1 (id UInt8, complex_value UInt32);
CREATE TABLE join_table_2 (id UInt8, ref_value Float32);
SELECT a.id, reinterpretAsInt16(a.complex_value) AS reinterp_val, reinterpretAsInt16(b.ref_value) AS joined_val FROM join_table_1 AS a JOIN join_table_2 AS b ON a.id = b.id;
SELECT data, reinterpretAsInt16(length(data)) AS length_as_int16 FROM string_table;
SELECT event_date, reinterpretAsInt16(toUInt32(event_date)) AS date_as_int16 FROM date_table;
SELECT uuid_value, reinterpretAsInt16(toUInt64(uuid_value)) AS uuid_as_int16 FROM uuid_table;
